description: Bluente provides document and text translation services, including format-preserving file translation, OCR, glossary support, and language metadata APIs. It also offers an MCP-based integration for AI agents to access document translation tools.
summary: Bluente exposes a bearer-authenticated Translation HTTP API at `api.bluente.com`, plus a BluTranslate MCP server at `https://translate.bluente.com/api/gpt-app/mcp` and an npm-distributed MCP CLI package `@bluente/mcp-server`.
